title: British Ambassador pays courtesy visit to the Director of INGUAT
body: "They discussed new opportunities for collaboration in the tourism and consular areas between the two countries. During the meeting, Ambassador Correa thanked INGUAT for its support to British tourists visiting Guatemala, highlighting the willingness of local authorities in consular matters.  The Ambassador also presented the work of the British consular office, which maintains close relations with British citizens residing in the country. The meeting allowed for the identification of areas for future cooperation, including the exchange of best practices in tourism promotion.    With more than 22,000 British tourists visiting Guatemala in 2024, the dialogue reaffirms the commitment of both countries to strengthen the bilateral relationship through tourism, culture, and citizen assistance. "
